s3.multiregionaccesspoint.region.CfnAbou: A bucket associated with a specific Region when creating Multi-Region Access Points.

s3.multiregionaccesspoint.region.Bucket.Description: The name of the associated bucket for the Region.

s3.multiregionaccesspoint.region.BucketA.Description: The AWS account ID that owns the Amazon S3 bucket that's associated with this Multi-Region Access Point.
